channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Musk rips 'fraudulent' Treasury handouts as reports mount DOGE has access to federal payment system
item.description: The Department of Government Efficiency, led by tech billionaire Elon Musk, has reportedly gained access to the Treasury Department's payment system.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israel's Netanyahu heads to US to discuss 'victory over Hamas' with Trump
item.description: TEL AVIV, Israel (AP) — Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Sunday he will discuss "victory over Hamas,” countering Iran and expanding diplomatic relations with Arab countries in his meeting with U.S. President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: TIA GOLDENBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rubio is holding talks in Panama as Trump demands canal control and pressures US neighbors
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is meeting Panama's president on his first stop on his trip foreign trip as President Donald Trump is upping pressure on America's neighbors including a demand for the Panama Canal to be returned to the United States.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Lee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: In immigration crackdown, Trump targets legal pathways
item.description: President Trump campaigned on a pledge to crack down on illegal immigration. But since taking office, he’s primarily targeted several longstanding programs that give migrants lawful ways to come to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Women represent half of the US. But they sometimes lack clout in budget and tax talks
item.description: JACKSON, Miss. (AP) — Women represent half of the U.S. population but it's still rare for them to have leading roles in setting taxes or budgets in some states. Take Mississippi, for example. Only one woman currently serves on the 14-member Joint Legislative Budget Committee.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US businesses brace for Trump's tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China to drive up costs
item.description: From an ice cream parlor in California to a medical supply business in North Carolina to a T-shirt vendor outside Detroit, U.S. businesses are bracing to take a hit from the taxes President Donald Trump has imposed on imports from Canada, Mexico and China, America’s three biggest trading partners.
item.dc:creator: Paul Wiseman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Democrats accused of corruption look to Trump for clemency
item.description: Democrats accused of corruption are seeking relief from President Trump as he hands out scores of pardons and drops charges against his political allies amid his crusade against the justice system that made him a convicted felon.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DOJ directs FBI to fire 8 top officials, identify employees involved in Jan. 6, Hamas cases for review
item.description: Acting Deputy Attorney General Emil Bove sent a memo to the acting FBI director Friday evening directing him to terminate eight FBI employees, Fox News has learned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pentagon prepares to deploy 1,000 more troops to bolster Trump's immigration crackdown
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Pentagon is readying orders for the deployment of at least 1,000 additional active duty troops to bolster President Donald Trump's expanding crackdown on immigration, U.S. officials said Friday.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colombian president urges illegal immigrants in US to return home days after diplomatic spat
item.description: The president of Colombia is urging his nationals in the U.S. illegally to return to Colombia, days after a diplomatic spat with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he and Putin could do something 'significant' toward ending Russia's war in Ukraine
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Friday said his administration has already had “very serious” discussions with Russia about its war in Ukraine and that he and Russian President Vladimir Putin could soon take “significant” action toward ending the grinding conflict.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Legal experts say Kash Patel's opposition to warrant requirement is not a major split
item.description: Legal experts say that while FBI director nominee Kash Patel's opposition to a warrant requirement shocked some lawmakers, the warrant requirement debate is far from new.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Illinois governor blocks pardoned Jan. 6 rioters from state jobs
item.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker (D) said he would block pardoned Capitol rioters from serving in local government positions, citing a state law ordinance, according to a Thursday letter obtained by The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Why some Minnesota law enforcement agencies will not follow Trump’s mass deportation plan
item.description: Besides laws which prevent local police from enforcing immigration law, some officials say they don’t have the resources to take on additional tasks.
item.dc:creator: Cari Spencer, MPR News

item.title: Black Caucus blasts Trump's DEI comments after Potomac plane crash
item.description: "Not only are the President’s claims untrue, they also speak to the Republican Party’s desire to divide us as a country.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, Fox 5

item.title: DEI drops and House drama won't stop Black Entrepreneurs Day at the Capitol
item.description: Activist Sheletta Brundidge says the third annual Black Entrepreneurs Day, which is scheduled for Monday, will go off without a hitch, despite being unexpectedly short of its $25,000 price tag.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: President Trump casts blame during briefing on deadly plane crash
item.description: President Donald Trump started Thursday’s press briefing with a moment of silence for the victims and their families after a deadly crash involving an American Airlines plane and an Army helicopter near Ronald Reagan National Airport on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, Fox 5

item.title: The effects of the Trump administration’s efforts to roll back DEI initiatives
item.description: MPR News host Angela Davis and her guests talk about the steps President Donald Trump has taken to dismantle the federal government’s diversity, equity and inclusion programs and how some private companies have responded.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis and Cari Dwyer, MPR News

item.title: Democrats leave 'emergency' meeting vowing ‘street fight’ in response to Trump actions
item.description: House Democrats launched a multilateral effort Wednesday to combat the flood of executive actions from President Trump, vowing to punch back through legislation, lawsuits and a blitz of counter-messaging.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's FBI director pick, Kash Patel, faces confirmation hearing
item.description: Kash Patel, President Donald Trump's pick to run the FBI, answers questions Thursday in a public hearing before the Senate Judiciary Committee.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Trump's pulling a U-turn on EVs, but not much has changed
item.description: President Donald Trump has charted a new course for electric vehicle policy in the U.S. While the direction is clear, the details aren't.
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske, MPR News

item.title: Trump signs Laken Riley Act, marking first legislative win of second term
item.description: President Trump on Wednesday signed the Laken Riley Act into law, marking his first legislative victory since he returned to the White House after he campaigned on immigration and the border during his 2024 campaign.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Democrats demand Patel information in special counsel's classified documents report
item.description: Democrats on the Senate Judiciary Committee are demanding to see the volume of former special counsel Jack Smith’s report dealing with the Mar-a-Lago classified documents investigation, asserting it has relevant information about Kash Patel, President Trump’s pick to lead the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: White House budget office rescinds federal funding freeze memo
item.description: The Trump administration’s Office of Management and Budget released a new memo Wednesday rescinding a controversial memo issued late Monday that froze a wide swath of federal financial assistance, which had paralyzed many federal programs and caused a huge uproar on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Trump's Nevada voters united on top issues while Harris backers couldn't, NVPOP poll shows
item.description: A new poll that examines the driving forces behind Nevada voters' decisions in the 2024 election shows that President Donald Trump's support came from people who were focused on two primary issues: the economy and immigration.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News
